thread.title: AAP's Stunning Victory Over Congress in Gidderbaha: A Setback for Raja Warring | Chandigarh News - Times of India
thread.title_full: AAP's Stunning Victory Over Congress in Gidderbaha: A Setback for Raja Warring | Chandigarh News - Times of India

author: Neel Kamal
title: AAP's Stunning Victory Over Congress in Gidderbaha: A Setback for Raja Warring | Chandigarh News - Times of India
text: Bathinda: From losing by 1,349 votes in 2022 to scripting a big victory now, former SAD leader and new AAP MLA Hardeep Singh Dimpy Dhillon defeated Punjab Congress president and Ludhiana MP Amrinder Singh Raja Warring’s wife, Amrita Warring, by 22,000 votes from Gidderbaha seat. The win in Gidderbaha, won three straight times by Raja Warring for Congress, is a first for AAP. With the win, Dhillon revenged his two consecutive defeats to Raja Warring. 115611978 The result is also a major setback to Raja Warring, who had been seeing himself as the Congress’s CM face for the 2027 assembly elections.Despite being the state president of Congress. he had confined himself to Gidderbaha to campaign for his wife and only symbolically visited other assembly constituencies. It is also a setback on the count that earlier this year, Congress had succeeded in winning seven of the 13 parliamentary constituencies in the state with Raja Warring as the state chief. The election result in Gidderbaha is also being seen as a major setback to former finance minister Manpreet Singh Badal, as he could get only little over 12,000 votes despite representing Gidderbaha for four consecutive terms as a SAD candidate. When Manpreet had lost for the first time from Gidderbaha in 2012 assembly elections, he could get 31,906 votes.We also published the following articles recentlyPunjab election result: Congress' Kuldeep Singh Dhillon wins Barnala bypollCongress candidate Kuldeep Singh Dhillon won the Barnala assembly seat in the Punjab byelection, defeating AAP's Harinder Singh Dhaliwal by a margin of 2,147 votes. The bypolls, held on November 20, were necessitated by the election of the previous MLAs to the Lok Sabha.115593512Sakoli assembly constituency results: Congress's Nana Patole wins against BJP's Avinash AnandraoCongress candidate Nanabhau Falgunrao Patole secured a narrow victory over BJP's Avinash Anandrao Brahmankar in the Sakoli assembly constituency. The primarily rural constituency, with a mix of agricultural and tribal populations, witnessed a close contest between the two candidates. Patole's win adds to the Congress's success in the Maharashtra assembly elections, where they aim to make significant gains.115584184MIM man wins by 162 votes, Congress state chief by 208The recent Maharashtra assembly elections saw several nail-biting finishes despite a Mahayuti sweep. AIMIM's Mufti Mohammed Ismail Abdul Khalique secured victory by a mere 162 votes, marking the slimmest margin. Congress state chief Nana Patole also faced a close contest, ultimately winning by 208 votes after a recount.115608505
